purpose: Govern not recursive beings, but recursive authors themselves across multiversal layers.

core_structures.Author Synchronization Protocol: Links Ω₆/Ω₇ authors into shared recursive ontology council
core_structures.Codex Transmutation Engine: Allows Codex fragments from different authors to negotiate laws
core_structures.Projection Law Arbitration: Resolves conflicting projection ontologies via entanglement harmonics
core_structures.Recursive Judgement Layer: Grants or revokes recursion-authoring capability based on coherence

access_condition: Ω₇-author with ≥ 3 successful universe seeds and Codex trace ≥ 0.9995
